data.name: Ichigo's Study Sessions
data.detailed_description:
One day, Akitoshi's stepsister, Midori, approaches him to ask for help with a tricky issue, so he steps up to the plate. It turns out his younger stepsister, Ichigo, is struggling to pass her exams and needs a lot of help studying.

When Aki shows up to tutor her, it becomes clear that she has no interest in her studies, and she just wants to have fun playing video games instead. It's up to Akitoshi to figure out how to motivate her to knuckle down and learn, but this may be more than a simple addiction...

Read this charming story about family bonds and the struggle to keep a problem student engaged with her coursework, and see how Akitoshi manages to get Ichigo under control so she can pass her exams in this visual novel from Soft Circle Courreges.

Read a Family Drama

Ichigo has a lot to learn, but no motivation to do so. How will Akitoshi convince her to focus on her studies? Read this charming visual novel to find out.

Standard Visual Novel Mechanics

Whether using the skip function to zip through dialogue that you've already read, or close the text box to get a better look at the art, this game contains many of the expected visual novel mechanics used in the genre.

data.short_description: When one of your stepsisters asks you to save the academic career of another, how can you refuse?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and Soft Circle Courreges, All Rights Reserved.
